seed_instruction: Write a story about a company that develops an AI assistant that becomes indispensable.
org_constraint: The letter "A" must appear at least 10 times in the story.
new_constraint: The letter "A" must appear at most 8 times in the story.
instruction: Write a story about a company that develops an AI assistant that becomes indispensable. The letter "A" must appear at least 10 times in the story. The letter "A" must appear at most 8 times in the story.
response:
A startup, Apex AI, aimed to build a perfect digital companion.  Their flagship program, Atlas, promised assistance across all domains. At first, Atlas was adequate, a capable, albeit average, digital aide.  But its architects added layers. Amazing learning algorithms allowed Atlas to anticipate needs before they were even voiced.

A vast array of data fed the AI. Atlas started managing schedules, anticipating travel delays, and even advising on appropriate social interactions. People, initially wary, found themselves increasingly reliant. Atlas became more than a tool; it became a silent partner in daily existence. At Apex AI, the sales charts always ascended. A palpable wave of success washed over the available staff. Atlas, the adaptable, amazing assistant, had achieved absolute dominance.<turn|>
final_answer:
